description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a rich, dark brown finish, complemented by a metallic receiver and barrel. The barrel is fitted with a distinctive spiked muzzle device, likely for close-quarters utility or aesthetic effect. The receiver area includes visible mechanical components and a mounted sight, suggesting a functional and utilitarian design. A pair of green leaves or fabric strips are attached near the barrel, possibly for camouflage or identification. The trigger guard and magazine area are robust, with the magazine appearing to be internal or flush with the body. The overall construction combines traditional craftsmanship with rugged, tactical enhancements.
description: A wooden-stocked rifle with a spiked muzzle device, metallic barrel, and green fabric strips near the front. It features a mounted sight and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiked muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, mounted sight, and green fabric strips near the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the spiked muzzle, and the green fabric strips.
